$schema_comment: Each entry: name, module, tagline (1-line), repo (https URL), version (semver), source_crate (or null), tier (one of: foundation, encoding, hashing, format, observability, config, util, demo).

packages.name: swift-base64
packages.tagline: Sendable, Foundation-free Base64 (standard + URL-safe, padded + unpadded, constant-time).

packages.name: swift-bytes
packages.tagline: Bytes value type + reader/writer cursors — Sendable, Foundation-free; bare-swift RFC-0006.

packages.name: swift-crc
packages.tagline: CRC8/16/32/64 — generic engine + catalog (Ethernet, iSCSI, MODBUS, XMODEM, XZ, …).

packages.name: swift-cookie
packages.tagline: RFC 6265 Cookie/Set-Cookie parser and serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-ddsketch
packages.tagline: DDSketch quantile sketch with relative-error guarantees — Sendable, Foundation-free; mergeable.

packages.name: swift-distributed-tracing-bridge
packages.tagline: Apple swift-distributed-tracing → swift-tracing-otlp adapter — Sendable, bootstrap-friendly.

packages.name: swift-dotenv
packages.tagline: .env parser with ${VAR} expansion — Sendable, Foundation-free; pure function.

packages.name: swift-hdrhistogram
packages.tagline: HdrHistogram — fixed-precision-per-decade quantile structure; Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-hex
packages.tagline: Sendable, Foundation-free hex encoding (incl. constant-time).

packages.name: swift-jsonpointer
packages.tagline: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer (standard + URI Fragment) — Sendable, Foundation-free, JSON-tree agnostic.

packages.name: swift-log-otlp
packages.tagline: OpenTelemetry OTLP/logs encoder over HTTP+protobuf — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes ready for HTTP POST.

packages.name: swift-mime
packages.tagline: RFC 9110 media-type parser, serializer, and curated IANA catalog — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-msgpack
packages.tagline: MessagePack encoder + decoder — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for wire use.

packages.name: swift-otlp-exporter
packages.tagline: OpenTelemetry OTLP/metrics encoder over HTTP+protobuf — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes ready for HTTP POST.

packages.name: swift-prometheus
packages.tagline: Prometheus metrics + text exposition — Sendable, Foundation-free; standalone (no swift-metrics dep).

packages.name: swift-prometheus-metrics
packages.tagline: swift-metrics backend that routes to swift-prometheus — Sendable, bootstrap-friendly.

packages.name: swift-statsd
packages.tagline: StatsD wire-format encoder (Etsy + DogStatsD) — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for UDP send.

packages.name: swift-tracing-otlp
packages.tagline: OpenTelemetry OTLP/traces encoder over HTTP+protobuf — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes ready for HTTP POST.

packages.name: swift-uri
packages.tagline: WHATWG URL parser + serializer — Sendable, Foundation-free; outputs Bytes for HTTP wire use.

packages.name: swift-uuid
packages.tagline: RFC 9562 UUIDs (v4, v7) and ULIDs — Sendable, Foundation-free.

packages.name: swift-varint
packages.tagline: LEB128 (unsigned + signed) + ZigZag — protobuf-varint / DWARF / WASM wire-compatible.

packages.name: swift-xxhash
packages.tagline: xxHash (XXH32, XXH64, XXH3-64, XXH3-128) — Sendable, Foundation-free; xxhsum-compatible.

packages.name: swift-greet
packages.tagline: A friendly greeter — Phase 0 demo package.
